![1.2.0Update](https://i.ibb.co/6tDNY6X/Animation-ezgif-com-crop.gif)
_________________________

To enter the Matrix dimension, you must first locate a Matrix Station. In the center of the station, you will find data items. You need to secretly explore the stations to collect 9 data items, or you can gather data from the sentinels when you defeat them, as they drop data items.

Once you have gathered 9 data items, you can craft them together to create a Big Data item. With the Big Data in your possession, right-click on the reinforced deepslate block at the center of the station to enter the Matrix.

The central totem, which consists of 3 blocks, can also be built manually using your hands, and it functions in the same way.

In front of you and standing close together 25 Agent Smiths can combine. When they combine, they will form the Chosen Agent Smith (only those that cannot fly). The Chosen Agent Smith is powerful and can perform strong leaps, as well as use telekinesis to grab and throw you.
